sound_gesture: upper teeth resting on lower lip, blowing a soft breeze
word_decor: round paper fan in one paw
expression: calm soft smile, closed eyes like meditating

voice.character_description: gentle airy voice, older wiser than the others, calm cadence

clips.gentle_retry: Light breath. Feel your top teeth.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You carry my breath now. I am with you.
